elements.description: Interior wall elevation showing full-height ceramic tile from floor to a mirror strip near the top; overall wall height 2.70m, tile/fixture zone height 2.00m
Mirror (M.), left side of elevation, above SP./SW. shower zone
Hand-held shower head with hose, left side, in the อาบน้ำ shower zone
Floor-level box marker '[2]+0.48[3]' under the shower zone
Floor-level box marker '[3]+0.50[2]' under the ห้องน้ำ2 zone
Bottom horizontal dimension chain: 0.45 + 0.45 + 0.50 + 0.80 + 0.40 = 2.60, sub-grouped as 0.90 (left, shower) + 0.10 + 1.70 (right cluster) with totals 1.00 and 1.80 printed above

warnings: This sheet (A-13) is the continuation of WC.2's detail (plan is on A-12, หน้า14) showing two interior wall elevations/sections (labelled '1' and '2' at the bottom); this file covers view '1' (mirrored left-right layout compared to WC.1's view 1 — shower zone on the left here vs right on WC.1). View '2' is in _หน้า15_wc2_side_profile2.json.
Level markers (0.48/0.50) and overall 2.70m wall height match exactly what is independently read on the WC.2 plan sheet (หน้า14) — cross-consistent.

As on the WC.2 plan sheet, the toilet fixture here is labeled 'WC.1' (นั่งราบ-type symbol) despite being in the ห้องน้ำ2/WC.2 room — same cross-sheet naming flag as _หน้า14_wc2_plan.json, not independently resolved here either.
